title: Cecilia Macaulay on Incorruptible
summary: Cecilia Macaulay says the book woke her up to why one would want to create a life-giving business.
blockquote: While there will always be a healthy market for extractive businesses, and a decent market for performative goodness, this book woke me up to why one would want to create a life-giving business: it's the highest expression of personal freedom and power, thus thrilling. But most compelling, going 'incorruptible' improves the demographic of the people you get to live out your years with, and that puts you in whole other universe.
attribution_title: Permaculture designer, Creator of the 'Save Cecilia' method
